items.title: Originally $220 Keychron OnePlus 81 Pro metal keyboard hits new Amazon all-time low at $123 (Save 44%)
items.summary:
Over at Amazon, you’ll find the official Keychron storefront offering its OnePlus 81 Pro model down at $123.19 shipped. This model originally launched at $220, but it has more recently been selling for around $154 at Amazon. Today’s deal drops it well below that price and marks the lowest price we’ve tracked at Amazon. It has only dipped this low once before at Woot when it hit $110. For comparison, the same model is currently listed at $170 on Keychron’s own site, while the Q1 Pro it’s based on is going for $210. Head below for more details.

items.title: Razer’s Kishi Ultra USB-C Hall effect controller grip for iPhone and iPad mini just hit a new $65 all-time low
items.summary:
As part of the wider Razer sale event at Woot, you can now score the brand’s Kishi Ultra USB-C controller grip down at $65.69 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise) with a 10% discount on the listed price that auto-applies during checkout. Originally priced at $150 and more recently hovering around $120 at Amazon, today’s offer marks the lowest price we’ve tracked for it – about $5 below the previous all-time low from last month. It’s a pretty good option to consider if you’re in the market to buy a new controller grip for your phone or iPad, and you can learn more about it below.

items.title: Top off iPhones + AirPods with this 2-in-1 UGREEN MagSafe charging station down at a $32 low
items.summary:
UGREEN’s official Amazon storefront is currently offering its Qi2 15W 2-in-1 MagSafe Wireless Charging Station down at $31.59 shipped. Down from its $45 full price, this affordable charging stand has been holding out at a Prime-exclusive $34 rate since late February, but you’re getting a better deal here today as this 30% markdown cuts $13 off the tag for the best price we have tracked. Likewise, if you want a more portable option as a travelling companion, you can find the brand’s MagFlow Qi2 2-in-1 Magnetic Foldable Wireless Charging Station down at $40, too.

AI Magicx Rune Plan, at just $69.97 (reg. $972), gives you a lifetime all-in-one AI workspace that tries to cover the entire modern internet job description: write, design, code, automate, repeat. That’s a big promise, but this is one of those platforms where the feature list actually lines up with how people work now—especially if your role swings between content, visuals, and technical tasks in the same afternoon.

items.title: Score Ninja’s popular space-saving 8-in-1 Flip oven at a new $127 low for spring kitchen upgrades (Up to $123 off list price)
items.summary:
Spring is awakening and as such, you may be looking to update your kitchen arsenal, which Shark/Ninja is assisting with by offering the popular Flip Gen 2 8-in-1 Air Fryer Toaster Oven back at $127.49 shipped, after using the bonus code BLOOM at checkout for an additional 15% savings, beating out its Amazon pricing by $23. While you may spy it there carrying a $250 MSRP, we more often find it starting around $220 at Amazon, with discounts having consistently taken costs down to $150, and only occasionally dropped things to the $130 low up until today. Now, with the extra 15% savings code here, you’re getting a better-than-ever 42% markdown off the going rate, saving you $93 (49% for $123 off the MSRP) and landing it at a new all-time low price. You can shop all the brand’s other small appliance offers on the main landing page here, as well as over in the official Amazon storefront here.
